description: Generates annotated candlestick-chart PNGs from broker or exchange fills for post-trade review and visualization without signals, predictions, or order execution.

notes: KLINE_AGENT_API_KEY is required for live API calls; the server can start without a key for tool-schema inspection.

clients: MCP clients that support stdio and environment variables

notes: The project README reports successful MCP initialize and tools/list checks with three tools.
